title: canthium merrillianum
intro: Canthium merrillianum, also known as the Kalinilai or Kalinil, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Canthium merrillianum include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal purposes.
